title: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) has released the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Project Research Scientist I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation, Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a ...
